rules.comment: A commit with multiple parents is a merge commit
rules.name: infer-merge-commit

rules.comment: If A is parent of B and B is parent of C, A is ancestor of C
rules.name: transitive-ancestry
rules.when_clause:
(child: $b, parent: $a) isa parentage;
(child: $c, parent: $b) isa parentage;

rules.comment: A contributor who authored commits on a branch contributed to the repo
rules.name: infer-contribution

rules.comment: File ownership inferred from blame majority
rules.name: infer-file-ownership
